tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation — xterm Dependency & Interface Definitions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the xterm package, define InteractiveShell and MuxPtySession models, update CommandExecutor/MuxBackend interfaces.

**Files:**
- Modify: pubspec.yaml
- Create: lib/services/mux/mux_pty_session.dart
- Modify: lib/services/mux/command_executor.dart
- Modify: lib/services/mux/mux_backend.dart
- Modify: lib/services/mux/psmux_backend.dart (stub)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pubspec.yaml", "lib/services/mux/mux_pty_session.dart", "lib/services/mux/command_executor.dart", "lib/services/mux/mux_backend.dart", "lib/services/mux/psmux_backend.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter pub get && flutter analyze", "acceptanceCriteria": ["xterm package added and flutter pub get succeeds", "MuxPtySession model defined", "CommandExecutor has openInteractiveShell", "MuxBackend has attachPty", "flutter analyze passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: SSH Client PTY Channel + Backend Implementation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement openInteractiveShell() in SshExecutor and attachPty() in TmuxBackend. Remove _inputShell and execInput() from SshClient.

**Files:**
- Modify: lib/services/ssh/ssh_client.dart
- Modify: lib/services/mux/ssh_executor.dart
- Modify: lib/services/mux/tmux_backend.dart

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/services/ssh/ssh_client.dart", "lib/services/mux/ssh_executor.dart", "lib/services/mux/tmux_backend.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter analyze", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SshClient.openPtyShell() opens SSH shell with PTY", "SshExecutor.openInteractiveShell() wraps openPtyShell into InteractiveShell", "TmuxBackend.attachPty() opens shell and runs tmux attach", "_inputShell and execInput removed", "flutter analyze passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Special Keys Bar — VT100 Escape Sequences
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace tmux key name format with VT100 escape sequences in special_keys_bar.dart.

**Files:**
- Modify: lib/widgets/special_keys_bar.dart

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/widgets/special_keys_bar.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter analyze", "acceptanceCriteria": ["On-screen buttons produce VT100 escape sequences", "Ctrl+letter produces control characters", "Hardware keyboard handling removed", "flutter analyze passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Battery Optimization Setting
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add askBatteryOptimization setting and check it before prompting.

**Files:**
- Modify: lib/providers/settings_provider.dart
- Modify: lib/services/background/foreground_task_service.dart
- Modify: lib/screens/settings/settings_screen.dart

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/providers/settings_provider.dart", "lib/services/background/foreground_task_service.dart", "lib/screens/settings/settings_screen.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter analyze", "acceptanceCriteria": ["askBatteryOptimization setting added with default true", "Setting persisted via SharedPreferences", "Toggle visible in settings screen", "ForegroundTaskService skips battery prompt when false", "flutter analyze passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Terminal Screen Rewrite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite terminal_screen.dart to use xterm.dart TerminalView + MuxPtySession stream. Remove all polling logic.

**Files:**
- Modify: lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter analyze", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TerminalView replaces AnsiTextView", "PTY stream connected to Terminal.write()", "User input via Terminal.onOutput written to PTY", "Resize forwarded to PTY", "Session drawer works via side channel", "Reconnection reopens PTY", "Special keys bar writes VT100 to PTY", "Enter Command writes to PTY", "No polling code remains", "flutter analyze passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Dead Code Removal & Cleanup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete unused files and clean up imports after the rewrite.

- lib/services/terminal/ansi_parser.dart
- lib/services/terminal/terminal_diff.dart
- lib/services/terminal/scrollback_buffer.dart
- lib/services/terminal/font_calculator.dart
- lib/providers/terminal_display_provider.dart
